name: Example Specialty ICP
description: SAMPLE ICP profile. Copy this into ICP_PROFILES_PATH as {icp_id}.json, rename the icp_id, and replace the signals with the checklist for your client/specialty. This file is example data only and is not loaded automatically.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the site advertise cash-pay, self-pay, membership, or out-of-pocket pricing?
signals.note: Must-have money signal. Confirmed absent ('no') caps the tier at Watchlist and applies no_weight; not visible ('not_found') caps at Needs Verification, unless inferred from elective procedures.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the practice list elective or cosmetic procedures patients typically pay for out of pocket?
signals.note: Listed elective procedures imply cash pay even when the words 'cash pay' never appear.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does this practice publicly list the target service line as a service they offer?
Does this appear to be an independent private practice (not hospital-owned, not part of a health system)?
Is this practice affiliated with, owned by, or part of a hospital or health system?
signals.note: Confirmed affiliation means long procurement cycles. Caps the tier at Watchlist regardless of score.
